titleStmt.title: SII 40.239: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 239. (A.R. No. B. 284 of 1933.) Lakkarājugārlapāḍu, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up before the temple of Paṭṭābhirāmasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1540, Siddhārthi, Phālguṇa, ba. 5, Monday, corresponding to 1619 A.D., February 23.

Records the construction of the temple and consecration of the god Raghunāyaka at Gārlapāḍu by Raghupati Nāyaka, son of Pinapōti-Nēḍu, the younger son of Chanupalli Yellama-Nāyaka, of the Peda-Padmanāyaka of the Vipparla-gōtra and a resident of Ōrugaṇṭipura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā
śrī svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1540 Agu sidhārdhi saṁvvatsa
ra phālguṇa ba 5 sōma
vāramunāṁḍu la
gārlapāṭi śrīraghu
nāyakulu pratiṣṭhā
dēvaḷaṁnu pedapadmanāya
kulayina vippalagōtra pavi
trulayina vōrugaṁṭipura
nivāsulayina canupalli
yallamanāyaniṁgāri ko
māḷlu pedapōtineṁḍu
pinapōtinēniṁgārilō pina
pōtinēnigāri komā
ruḍayina raghupa
ti rāyaniṁgāri cā
tanu navadhariṁccināru
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
